roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 1, 15PG ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT RESTITUTION REPORT DATED 12-08-20/EXHRET/X: A HEARING WAS CONDUCTED AS TO RESTITUTION OWED TO THE VICTIMS IN THIS CASE, THE COURT ORDERS, RESTITUTION IS TO BE SET AT $1500,00 PAYABLE TO THE VICTIM OLIM ALIZHANOVPLUS 10% INTEREST PER YEAR (PC '1202,4(F)(3)(G)), AND AN ADMINISTRATIVE FEEOF UP TO 15% (PC '1203,1(1)) AND ALSO RESTITUTION IS TO BE SET AT $1000,00PAYABLE TO THE VICTIM ZHADRYA BIBITALIYEVA   PLUS 10% INTEREST PER YEAR (PC '1202,4(F)(3)(G)), AND AN ADMINISTRATIVE FEE OF UP TO 15% (PC '1203,1(1)), /X: THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNTS,/X: CR-110'S AND CR-111'S ARE SIGNED AND FILED/X: DEFENDANT REFERRED TO ROOM101 TO PAY RESTITUTION THROUGH THE COURT'S COLLECTION UNIT/CCU/

/CAL:TO SET MRESTITUTION HEARING & MOTIO TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL/DAWT/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE DEFENSE MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL/CTORD:ATTORNEYNEIL HALLINAN IS APPOINTED TO REPRESENT THE DEFENDANT/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DOPU:ATTORNEY HAS AUTHORITY TO ACCEPT/

/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/X:RESTITUTION CLAIMS ARE MADE BY THE FOLLOWING VICTIMS:/X:OLIM ALIZHANOV - $12,148,54/X:ZHADRYA BIBITALIYEVA $4,940,00/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AS TO ANY OTHER VICTIMS IN THISMATTER/RESTR/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING & WITHDRAWAL OF COUNSEL/DOP
